description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a symmetrical facade, a central front entryway, and a gable roof. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and is set back from the street, with a driveway leading to a detached garage on the right side. The front of the house features a covered porch with steps, flanked by columns, and multiple windows arranged in neat rows. Mature trees are positioned around the property, providing shade and enhancing the residential feel. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the dark gray roof. The house sits at the intersection of two paved roads, with sidewalks and a crosswalk visible in front.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, central porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a driveway and detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and symmetrical window arrangement, as well as the driveway and garage to the right.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the detached garage, side windows, and several trees behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backyard area, more trees, and the back of the house with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Left-side view displaying the side of the house, additional trees, and the intersection of the roads.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with covered porch, steps, and supporting columns
